name: Knegli (Plum Dumplings)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add salt and eggs to the mashed potatoes and combine farina and flour.
2. Mix everything together and knead until a smooth dough forms.
3. Roll out the dough on a floured surface into a large rectangle.
4. Cut the dough into 15 squares.
5. Wash, pit, and dry the plums.
6. Place half a teaspoon of sugar in the center of each plum.
7. Place a plum in the center of each square.
8. Fold the dough around the plum, completely enclosing it.
9. Drop the dumplings into boiling, salted water and cook for 20 minutes.
10. Drain the dumplings and serve topped with buttered bread crumbs.
